description: As a rock gnome, you have a natural inventiveness and hardiness beyond that of other gnomes.

trait.Darkvision.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

trait.Gnomish Cunning.description: You have advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

trait.Languages.description: You can speak, read, and write Common and Gnomish.
